perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing heavy makeup, a brown camisole, and a necklace. She touches her cheek with her hand and looks slightly away from the camera. (2) She turns her head to look directly at the camera while speaking, her expression shifting from a slight pout to a gentle smile. (3) She continues to gesture with her hand near her neck and chest area as she finishes her sentence, maintaining a warm and intimate eye contact with the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in a soft, gentle, and slightly breathy tone in Mandarin. (2) A light, melodic piano background track plays continuously at a low volume. (3) The vocal delivery remains steady and intimate, accompanied by the subtle sound of the indoor environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '!!!' - Decorative exclamation appearing near the woman's head, indicating surprise or emphasis. (2) '早點睡吧' (Go to bed early) - Functional text offering advice with a caring tone. (3) '心里已经很变态了' (The heart is already very twisted/messed up) - Functional text with a humorous or self-deprecating emotional tone. (4) '身体一定要健康啊' (The body must be healthy) - Functional text emphasizing well-being with an encouraging tone.

The goal is to build a parasocial connection through a warm, personal address.
